code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Mapping of predicates to human‑readable phrase generators
    phrase_map = {
        "cityServed": lambda o: f"serves the city of {o}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level",
        "location": lambda o: f"is located in {o}",
        "operatingOrganisation": lambda o: f"is operated by {o}",
        "runwayLength": lambda o: f"has a runway length of {o} metres",
        "runwayName": lambda o: f"'s runway is named {o}",
        "country": lambda o: f"is in {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda o: f"is part of {o}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has ICAO code {o}",
        "locationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has location identifier {o}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"has IATA code {o}",
        "nativeName": lambda o: f"is also known as {o}",
        "leaderParty": lambda o: f"'s leader party is {o}",
        "capital": lambda o: f"'s capital is {o}",
        "language": lambda o: f"'s language is {o}",
        "leader": lambda o: f"'s leader is {o}",
        "owner": lambda o: f"is owned by {o}",
        "largestCity": lambda o: f"'s largest city is {o}",
        "countySeat": lambda o: f"'s county seat is {o}",
        "administrativeArrondissement": lambda o: f"is in administrative arrondissement {o}",
        "mayor": lambda o: f"'s mayor is {o}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"has runway surface {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda o: f"'s official language is {o}",
        "city": lambda o: f"is located in {o}",
        "jurisdiction": lambda o: f"has jurisdiction over {o}",
        "demonym": lambda o: f"'s demonym is {o}",
        "aircraftHelicopter": lambda o: f"uses helicopter {o}",
        "transportAircraft": lambda o: f"uses transport aircraft {o}",
        "currency": lambda o: f"'s currency is {o}",
        "headquarter": lambda o: f"'s headquarter is {o}",
        "class": lambda o: f"belongs to class {o}",
        "division": lambda o: f"belongs to division {o}",
        "order": lambda o: f"belongs to order {o}",
        "regionServed": lambda o: f"serves the region of {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda o: f"has the leader title of {o}",
        "hubAirport": lambda o: f"has hub airport at {o}",
        "foundedBy": lambda o: f"was founded by {o}",
        "foundingYear": lambda o: f"was founded in {o}",
        "postalCode": lambda o: f"'s postal code is {o}",
        "areaCode": lambda o: f"'s area code is {o}",
        "ceremonialCounty": lambda o: f"is in ceremonial county {o}",
        "chief": lambda o: f"'s chief is {o}",
        "aircraftFighter": lambda o: f"uses fighter aircraft {o}",
        "attackAircraft": lambda o: f"uses attack aircraft {o}",
        "battle": lambda o: f"was involved in the battle of {o}",
    }

    from collections import defaultdict
    subject_phrases: dict[str, list[str]] = defaultdict(list)

    for t in triples:
        generator = phrase_map.get(t.predicate)
        phrase = generator(t.object) if generator else f"{t.predicate} {t.object}"
        subject_phrases[t.subject].append(phrase)

    sentences: list[str] = []
    for subj, phrases in subject_phrases.items():
        if len(phrases) == 1:
            sentences.append(f"{subj} {phrases[0]}.")
        else:
            sentences.append(f"{subj} " + ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + ".")

    # Join all sentences into one complex sentence for better coherence
    if len(sentences) == 1:
        result = sentences[0]
    elif len(sentences) == 2:
        result = sentences[0] + ", " + sentences[1]
    else:
        result = "; ".join(sentences)

    # Ensure proper capitalization
    return result[0].upper() + result[1:] if result else ""

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
